creator: brian@FreeBSD.org
text:
Given that the R package has a 'USE_FORTRAN=yes' line (and had when
 7.1 was released), the question becomes "why didn't the pkg_add -r
 of math/R install gcc42?
 
 Thomas, if you still have the logs, were there any errors at
 installation time when you ran pkg_add -r?  If you haven't got
 the logs any more, I'd like to close this bug as the dependency
 works ok in 7.2 and once I merge
 
     http://svn.freebsd.org/changeset/base/194497
 
 all the bugs I know of with package dependency errors will be
 fixed.
 
 Cheers.
 
 -- 
 Brian Somers                                       <brian@Awfulhak.org>
 Don't _EVER_ lose your sense of humour !            <brian@FreeBSD.org>
